# **CDSE -** **Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem API Wrapper**

## Description

This package provides the interface to the [‘Copernicus Data Space
Ecosystem’ API](https://dataspace.copernicus.eu/analyse/apis), mainly
for searching the catalogue of available data from Copernicus Sentinel
missions and obtaining the images for just the area of interest based on
selected spectral bands. The package uses the ‘Sentinel Hub’ RESTful
[API
interface](https://dataspace.copernicus.eu/analyse/apis/sentinel-hub) to
access various satellite imagery archives. It allows you to access raw
satellite data, rendered images, statistical analysis, and other
features.

This package is in no way officially related to or endorsed by
Copernicus.

![](reference/figures/CDSE.png)

Image generated by [Your Name In
Landsat](https://landsat.gsfc.nasa.gov/apps/YourNameInLandsat-main/index.html)

## Installation

### Stable version

You can install the current stable version of `CDSE` from
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=CDSE):

``` r
install.packages("CDSE")
```

Windows and macOS binary packages are available from here.

### Development version

You can install the development version of `CDSE` including latest
features from [GitHub](https://github.com/zivankaraman/CDSE):

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("zivankaraman/CDSE")
```

## Usage

Access to the ‘Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem’ is free, but you have to
register to get the authentication credentials required to use the API.
These necessary steps are explained in detail in the [BEFORE YOU
START](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/articles/BeforeYouStart.md)
article, so please read it first.

Once you have set up your working environment, the [GET
STARTED](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/articles/CDSE.md) will
guide you through the main functions and demonstrate how to use the
package.

## License

This package is released under
[AGPL-3](https://cran.r-project.org/web/licenses/AGPL-3).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`CDSE-deprecated`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/CDSE-deprecated.md)
  :

  Deprecated functions in package CDSE.

- [`CDSE`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/CDSE.md) :
  Package providing interface to the 'Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem'
  API

- [`GetArchiveImage`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetArchiveImage.md)
  : Get image from the archive (deprecated)

- [`GetCollections()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetCollections.md)
  : List available collections

- [`GetImage()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetImage.md)
  : Get image from the archive

- [`GetImageByTimerange()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetImageBy....md)
  [`GetImageByAOI()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetImageBy....md)
  [`GetImageByBbox()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetImageBy....md)
  : Get image from the archive (vectorization ready)

- [`GetOAuthClient()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetOAuthClient.md)
  : Get OAuth client

- [`GetOAuthToken()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetOAuthToken.md)
  : Get OAuth token

- [`GetQueryables()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetQueryables.md)
  : Get CQL2 parameters for a collection

- [`GetStatistics()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetStatistics.md)
  : Get statistical values

- [`GetStatisticsByTimerange()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetStatisticsBy....md)
  [`GetStatisticsByAOI()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetStatisticsBy....md)
  [`GetStatisticsByBbox()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/GetStatisticsBy....md)
  : Get statistical values (vectorization ready)

- [`MakeEvalScript()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/MakeEvalScript.md)
  : Create a Sentinel Hub API Evalscript

- [`Point2Bbox()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/Point2Bbox.md)
  : Create bounding box around a point

- [`SearchCatalog()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SearchCatalog.md)
  : Search collection for available images

- [`SearchCatalogByTimerange()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SearchCatalogBy....md)
  [`SearchCatalogByAOI()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SearchCatalogBy....md)
  [`SearchCatalogByBbox()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SearchCatalogBy....md)
  : Search collection for available images (vectorization ready)

- [`SeasonalFilter()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SeasonalFilter.md)
  : Filter image catalog for seasonal images

- [`SeasonalTimerange()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SeasonalTimerange.md)
  : Create seasonal time range

- [`SetPathAPI()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/SetPathAPI.md)
  : Set API Path Structure

- [`UniqueCatalog()`](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/reference/UniqueCatalog.md)
  : Produce image catalog without multiple entries per date
